description: Perform structural comparative analysis with labs-teamwork-spec, design the framework/state separation strategy, and build the M6-B cleanup manifest.
scope: Generate three markdown documents capturing the design outputs of the reconnaissance: 1) tasks/v0.6-m6-a-state-separation-design.md, 2) tasks/v0.6-m6-a-comparative-synthesis.md, and 3) tasks/v0.6-m6-a-cleanup-manifest.md. Read references to docs/ and protocol/ to formulate a deprecation/stubbing strategy. Review the target path structure inside labs-teamwork-spec.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO execution of deletions, large-scale migrations, or file stubbing. This phase only generates the design and manifest documentation. NO modification to existing workflow, source, or execution files.
stop_conditions: Attempting to delete or move any existing files.
Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Executing without an approved M6-A contract.
